hero.headline: Free Digital Skills Training — Get a Remote Tech Job
hero.subheadline: Build the tech skills that get you hired. Remotely or anywhere. Free structured training — not a MOOC.
hero.reassurance: No fees · No degree required · Brussels & Antwerp campuses

clusters.name: FLEXIBILITY & REMOTE WORK
clusters.heading: Work flexibility. Tech skills that travel.
clusters.body: Remote jobs are the dominant reason people start learning tech — and the data proves it. The modern labour market rewards the people who can deliver value from anywhere. At 42 Belgium, you build the exact skills that unlock remote jobs, online work, and work from home roles across Europe. You learn the tools distributed engineering teams actually use: version control, pair programming, code review, continuous deployment, and asynchronous collaboration. By the time you graduate, you have a portfolio you can review from anywhere, projects you shipped with peers you never met in person, and the confidence to apply for online jobs work from home. This is not theory. This is the way modern software teams operate every single day.
bullets: Real programming skills for remote jobs across Europe
Tools and workflows used by distributed engineering teams
A portfolio that travels — review it and show it from anywhere
Peer-to-peer collaboration that mirrors how remote tech teams work
Direct pathway from training to online work opportunities

clusters.name: ACCESSIBLE FREE TRAINING
clusters.heading: Free structured training — not a MOOC.
clusters.body: Let us be blunt. This is not a free online course you scroll through at midnight and forget by morning. 42 Belgium is a complete, peer-to-peer training program — free of charge, with physical campuses in Brussels and Antwerp. Unlike free online courses or online classes free that everybody starts and nobody finishes, here you build projects alongside peers, submit your work for review, and graduate ready to work. Unlike a typical free online course, you leave with a portfolio of shipped projects, not a PDF certificate you lose in your downloads folder. We offer the accessibility people love about free online courses with free certificates and free online courses with certificates, combined with the structure, accountability, and outcomes a self-paced MOOC can never deliver. Our program is fully funded so that talent — not budget — decides who gets access to tech education. No tuition. No hidden fees. No upsells. Ever.
keywords: free online courses with free certificates

clusters.name: LOW BARRIER TO ENTRY
clusters.heading: No CV. No degree. No experience required.
clusters.body: If you have searched for online jobs no experience, you already know the problem. Every entry-level tech role asks for two years of experience. 42 Belgium is the bridge. We welcome career changers from every possible background — retail, hospitality, teaching, administration, hospitality, music, parenting — people with zero technical training but real motivation to build a new path. Our entry process measures potential, not past. No coding knowledge assumed. No diploma required. No CV to polish. You take a short online logic test, discover peer-to-peer learning in our Piscine, and decide together if this path is right for you. The only experience required is the willingness to start.
bullets: Online jobs no experience — we prepare you for them
No technical background required to apply
No age limit — career changers of every age welcome
No diploma, no CV, no admission essay
A real career change, not a side hobby

faq.question: Is this really free?
faq.answer: Yes. 42 Belgium is 100% free — no tuition, no hidden costs, no upsells. Our program is fully funded so that talent, not budget, decides who gets access to tech education.

faq.question: Is this just another MOOC or free online course?
faq.answer: No. Unlike free online courses with certificates you complete alone at home, 42 is a structured program with physical campuses, peer-to-peer learning, shared projects and deadlines. You graduate with a portfolio of real work — not just a PDF.

faq.question: Can I really find remote jobs after graduating?
faq.answer: Many of our graduates land remote jobs, work from home contracts, and online work roles. The skills you build — modern programming, team collaboration, shipping real projects — are exactly what distributed tech teams hire for.

faq.question: I have zero tech experience. Can I still apply?
faq.answer: Yes. 42 Belgium was built for online jobs no experience candidates and career changers with no coding background. Our selection test measures potential, not past knowledge. Most students arrive from completely non-tech fields.

faq.question: Do I need a degree or diploma?
faq.answer: No. No diploma, no CV required. The only prerequisites are motivation and the willingness to take our short online logic test.

faq.question: How is this different from free online courses with free certificates?
faq.answer: Free online certificates prove you completed a video series. Our program proves you can ship real software with a team. The difference shows in your portfolio — and in the job offers you receive afterwards.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to find your training?
ctaFinal.description: Free structured training. Real remote job opportunities. No degree required. No MOOC. Start with our online test — no experience needed.
